checklistName: Post PR231 Private Local Operation Verification Checklist
operationPolicy: Private Local first; private-local.html, index.html, and local browser confirmation remain the operating basis after PR #231 main pull.
handoffPolicy: Company PC working tree clean confirmation and home PC continuation readiness are manual confirmation items.
securitySoftwarePolicy: Norton and security-software friendly operation; no hidden updater, auto-run launcher, suspicious background execution, or dangerous launcher extension changes.
devicePolicy: Home PC continues after main pull; company PC hands off from a clean tree; iPad remains view / confirmation only.
prMergePolicy: Main branch only after pull; no direct commit to main; feature branch and Draft PR are required; merge only after user confirmation.

postPr231MergeChecks.label: PR #231 merged confirmation is required before using main as the baseline.
Phase21-36 main reflection is confirmed after pull.
Main branch is used only after pull confirmation.

handoffChecks.label: Company PC working tree clean confirmation is required.
Home PC continuation ready confirmation is required.
Local browser confirmation is required for private-local.html and index.html.

branchPrMergeChecks.label: Feature branch is required for follow-up work.

privateLocalChecks.label: Security software friendly operation remains required.

blockedAutomationChecks.label: No suspicious auto-run script is added.

prohibitedActions.label: Do not create or modify .bat files.
Do not create or modify .ps1 files.
Do not create or modify .cmd files.
Do not create or modify .exe files.

operationPrinciples: PLAN_ONLY / Protected / Draft PR first / merge only after user confirmation remains unchanged.
private-local.html and index.html remain the manual local entry points.
GitHub Pages and public delivery are not required.
Company PC to home PC handoff is verified manually after PR #231 is merged.
Security software friendly operation avoids auto-update, auto-run, hidden updater, and suspicious background execution.
nextRecommendedStep: Pull main on home PC after PR #231 merge confirmation, confirm private-local.html and index.html locally, and start follow-up work only from a feature branch with a Draft PR.
